title: EvidenceBundle
description: JSON-safe evidence bundle returned by collect_evidence_bundle(). Contains schema_version, status, sections, errors, and limitations.

adapter_status.description: Per-adapter runtime status evidence extracted from diagnostics, or null.

collected_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when collection started.

command.description: Command that produced this bundle. Always 'evidence'.

errors.description: List of error messages from sections that encountered errors.

evidence_tier.description: Evidence provenance tier describing how the evidence was produced. 'live_service' and 'hardware' require explicit opt-in; they are never auto-inferred.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when generation completed.

limitations.description: Known limitations of the evidence collection process.

runtime_started.description: Whether the runtime was started to collect live health data.

shutdown_evidence.description: Runtime shutdown/cancellation evidence extracted from diagnostics, or null.

convergence_summary.description: Per-event convergence diagnostics summary derived from delivery receipts and outbox items, or null.

AdapterStatusEvidence.title: AdapterStatusEvidence
AdapterStatusEvidence.description: JSON-safe evidence for a single adapter's runtime status.

connected.description: True if connected, False if definitely not, null if indeterminate.

current_state.description: Lifecycle state value string (e.g. 'ready'), or null.

enabled.description: Whether the adapter is enabled in config.

valid_transitions.description: Sorted list of valid target state strings, or null.

ShutdownEvidence.title: ShutdownEvidence
ShutdownEvidence.description: Immutable shutdown evidence record with deterministic key ordering.

drain_timeout_detected.description: Whether drain timeout was detected from events or reason.

evidence_flush_status.description: Status of evidence persistence at shutdown (e.g. 'flushed', 'partial').

in_flight_count.description: Number of in-flight deliveries from capacity controller.

outbox_shutdown_policy.description: Outbox shutdown policy name. 'resumable' when outbox_counts were supplied; null when no outbox data.

pending_outbox_counts.description: Outbox counts filtered to pending statuses, or null.

pending_retry_work_total.description: Total count of pending retry work items.

resume_expected.description: Whether pending outbox work is expected to resume on next start. True when non-terminal outbox work exists and runtime is stopped/stopping.

retry_worker_dead_lettered.description: Number of retry items that were dead-lettered.

retry_worker_failed.description: Number of retry items that failed.

retry_worker_running.description: Whether the retry worker was running at shutdown.

retry_worker_succeeded.description: Number of retry items that succeeded.

runtime_state.description: Runtime lifecycle state value string at shutdown.

shutdown_reason.description: Deterministic shutdown reason string, or null.

tasks_cancelled.description: Number of tasks cancelled during shutdown, or null.

EvidenceSection.title: EvidenceSection
EvidenceSection.description: A single evidence section with status, optional error, and optional data.

error.description: Error message if the section encountered an error.

data.description: Section payload data. Null when unavailable or skipped.

ConvergenceSummary.title: ConvergenceSummary
ConvergenceSummary.description: Aggregate convergence summary across all delivery targets for a single event.

evidence_bundle_ref.description: Reserved cross-reference to the evidence bundle. Currently null.

orphan_count.description: Count of orphan records. Currently null until orphan SQL integration.

severity_counts.description: Count of targets per severity level (safe, degraded, inconsistent).

targets.description: Per-target convergence results, deterministically sorted by group key.

total_targets.description: Total number of unique delivery targets examined.

worst_severity.description: The worst convergence severity across all targets, or null if no targets.

DeliveryTargetConvergence.title: DeliveryTargetConvergence
DeliveryTargetConvergence.description: Convergence state for a single delivery target.

delivery_plan_id.description: Delivery plan grouping key. Empty string when absent.

outbox_status.description: Status of the outbox item, or null if no outbox item.

latest_receipt_status.description: Status of the latest receipt, or null if no receipt.

latest_receipt_id.description: Receipt ID of the latest receipt, or null.

latest_attempt_number.description: Attempt number from the latest receipt, or null.
